title: amitostigma keiskeoides
intro: Amitostigma keiskeoides, also known as Keiske's orchid, is a species of orchid native to East Asia, particularly in China and Japan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Amitostigma keiskeoides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
